productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Solid Black Sweatshirt
description: CompositionBlack sweatshirt made of 100% cotton, has a mock collar with blue and white tips, long raglan sleeves with blue and white tips on the ribbed cuffs, full front buttoned placket, two insert pockets on the sides, embroidered and appliquéd branding on the chest and a ribbed hemFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergentTumble dry lowWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsStay cosy in in all seasons with this stylish sweatshirt from US Polo. The soft cotton fabric against your skin gives you exemplary comfort. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it over your Sports kit or over a t-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
